config.note: quick validation at step=20; full headline config (step=5, estimators=40) requires ~40min
config.annualization_note: Sharpe rescaled 2026-06-11 to 252/step=12.6 trades/yr (deterministic x0.4924 correction of the original 52/yr annualization). At step=20 the cadence is 4x sparser than the step=5 headline, so these absolute Sharpes are NOT comparable to the headline 2.44 — only the within-test delta and the accuracy gap matter.
